question: Based on the area chart of costs from 2018 to 2022, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: The chart does not allow comparison of the highest cost years because they exceed the visible range.
options.B: Costs increased by the same amount each year from 2018 to 2022.
options.C: The costs in 2021 and 2022 are equal.
options.D: The cost in 2018 was higher than in any other year.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
